expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications. Store read state so it persists across sessions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification schema with read state",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to add schema for notifications that persists read state across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add schema for notifications with boolean read state",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/db/schema.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add shared types for notifications",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to define types for notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Define notification type with read state",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/types/notification.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend action to fetch notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want the backend to return my notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint returns list of notifications",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add UI for notification list and badge",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see an unread badge and open my notification list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI includes unread badge based on fetch data",
        "Clicking badge opens notification list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add backend action to toggle read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want the backend to support marking notifications read or unread.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint updates read state",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add UI to mark notifications read/unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to toggle read state from the notification list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list items have read/unread toggle control",
        "Toggling calls the backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/NotificationList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add UI to filter by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter my notification list to see only unread items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list includes filter control for read state",
        "List updates when filter is applied",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/NotificationList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Add backend action to clear read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want the backend to support clearing all read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint deletes or archives read notifications",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-009",
      "title": "Add UI to clear read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want a button to clear all my read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list includes a button to clear read items",
        "Clicking button calls backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 9,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
